title: ⁠⁠I am an employee of a corporate...

messages.content: ⁠⁠I am an employee of a corporate client and I’ve been designated as their technical point of contact. What specific categories of my personal data does DEW21 process for this contract, and what is the legal basis according to the Data Protection section?

Based on the provided context from [Allgemeine_Lieferbedingungen_Erdgas_Haushaltskunenn.pdf_en.txt], the specific categories of personal data that DEW21 processes for this contract and their legal bases are as follows:

- **Categories of Personal Data Processed:**
  - Contact details (e.g., name, email address, telephone number)
  - Data relating to job titles

- **Legal Basis:**
  - The processing is carried out on the basis of Article 6(1)(b) GDPR. This legal basis applies because DEW21 processes the specified categories of personal data for the purpose of fulfilling the energy supply contract.

Sources:
- [Allgemeine_Lieferbedingungen_Erdgas_Haushaltskunenn.pdf_en.txt]
